builder_description: Use the controls below to build, preview, and launch a role-based DM campaign.
validation_no_recipients: No eligible recipients were found for that role.
preview_footer: Preview only. Nothing has been sent yet.
confirm_footer: Once started, the sender will process the frozen recipient snapshot.
permission_error: You do not have permission to use this command.
campaign_already_running: A campaign is already active for this guild.
status_none: There is no active or recent campaign to display.
confirm_description: Review the frozen recipient snapshot before sending.
history_reuse_loaded: Campaign loaded into the builder. Edit and run when ready.
history_reuse_footer: Use the dropdown below to reuse or delete a campaign.
history_delete_not_found: Campaign not found or already deleted.
validation_batch_numbers: Batch size and interval must be numbers.
validation_batch_size_range: Batch size must be between 1 and {max_batch_size}.
validation_interval_range: Batch interval must be between 1 and {max_batch_interval_minutes} minutes.
